description: MOVE-IN READY- Beautiful, LARGE, 4 BDRM, 3.5 Bath, Semi-Detached Townhome - GORDON SQUARE by Paddington Properties a boutique community of 32 homes, now 90% sold.  Nestled in a quiet loc. yet only minutes to, schools, Langley Costco, transit & amenities. Feat. wide layout, 10' ceiling on main, open kitchen with Kitchen Aid appl. incl. gas cooktop, wall oven, B/I Panasonic microwave, quartz countertops & large island. Primary BDRM boasts deep walk in closet, ensuite with glassed in shower, soaker tub & dual sinks. Main upper Bath also w/dual sinks. Lower level;  Huge family room, bedroom and full bath. Attached Finished, Double S/S garage w/ EV rough in. Showhome open Sat/Sun 12-5 pm.  Authentic, Luxurious Quality - Don't wait.
